Build what the best in finance use daily

See open positions

Go beyond numbers

Quartr is a software company serving the world of finance. Every day, leading companies and financial institutions worldwide use our products to research faster and understand deeper. For too long, financial markets have been obsessed with numbers. Everybody has access to the same quantitative data — the same ratios, the same forecasts, the same models. Meanwhile, qualitative research – the words, the signals, the nuance – has remained mostly in the shadows. We exist to bring efficiency and precision to qualitative public market research. Because the truth is often spoken, not just calculated. Our products are used daily by some of the most sophisticated teams in finance and tech, including major hedge funds and Magnificent 7 companies, and over a million finance professionals have downloaded our mobile app. We're a passionate team that moves fast, thinks long-term, and cares deeply about quality. Attention to detail is what sets both great products and brands apart. We're setting the bar higher than most, and we're still at the very beginning of what we believe will be a multi-decade journey. We know our success depends on attracting and keeping exceptional people. We strongly believe in ownership, it creates long-term thinking and ensures success is shared by everyone who helps drive it. Every team member therefore receives equity exposure. We're based in Stockholm, New York, and Dublin, with hybrid and remote options. Looking to do your life's work? We'd love to hear from you.

How we work at Quartr

Long-termism

We prioritize decisions that maximize durable, long-term value.

Ownership

We act like owners, holding ourselves accountable for real outcomes.

Focus

We do fewer things better and avoid spreading ourselves thin.

Quality

We are quality-obsessed, every detail matters because the whole depends on it.

Commitment

We show up with urgency, responsiveness, and genuine buy-in.

Best idea wins

We let the strongest arguments win, not titles or hierarchy.
